summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU stuck at 99% on Morpheus devices (VOY5200,VOY8200)
feature: Android DFU (Device Firmware Update) - Morpheus devices
scenario: Language update on Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200) gets stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes, causing total update time to exceed 10 minutes instead of the expected 1-2 minutes.
description_clean: Language update (LANG UPDATE) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes on Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200) before completing. Previously, language changes took 1-2 minutes, but now they take 10 minutes or more. Expected behavior: language update should complete within 2 minutes for Morpheus devices.
steps: 1. Start a language update (LANG UPDATE) on a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Observe the progress of the language update.
3. Note that the update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes.
4. Wait for the update to eventually complete.
expected: Language update should complete within 2 minutes for Morpheus devices.
actual: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes, taking 10 minutes or more to complete (previously took 1-2 minutes).
